title: Eva unites us all Much better than the Olympics
display_title: Eva unites us all Much better than the Olympics
wikitext:
[]: 'Eva unites us all. (Much better than the Olympics.)"             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Dec 02, 2010 12:40 pm I've run into an issue. Our slogan, "Eva unites us all. (Much better than the Olympics.)" is all over the place. Can someone fill me in on where this slogan originated. Carl Horn said it somewhere, but I can't find the original instance because search is flooded by quotations. Thanks.

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Thu Dec 02, 2010 1:22 pm Innit "Like the Olympics."?

[]: EGF's slogan is so original it's now unoriginal.             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Thu Dec 02, 2010 1:34 pm This is the first place I heard it. Maybe they all just copied us?

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Dec 02, 2010 1:40 pm I thought you came up with it.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Dec 02, 2010 2:20 pm InstrumentalityOne wrote: Innit "Like the Olympics."?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Dec 02, 2010 2:39 pm It's a play on Carl's quote about anime/manga. I'm the one responsible. Was trying to think of a not-completely-lame "slogan" for the forum and it popped into my head.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Dec 02, 2010 2:50 pm Reichu wrote: It's a play on Carl's quote about anime/manga. I'm the one responsible. Was trying to think of a not-completely-lame "slogan" for the forum and it popped into my head.

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Thu Dec 02, 2010 11:50 pm Considering the kinds of things that go on in this forum, I'd say that our slogan is not only in need of replacement, but also totally false.

[]:             Quote Post by Merridian » Fri Dec 03, 2010 12:24 am ^"Evangelion unites us all, like the World Cup"?

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Fri Dec 03, 2010 12:25 am Reichuy should have written a few letters to the USPTO and WIPO then she and this forum could be blingin' like nobody's business if CafePress, Google AdWords and a trademark lawyer or two got involved

[]:             Quote Post by Grimmjow » Fri Dec 03, 2010 4:49 pm It's a bit ironic considering that Eva is so subjective that its very content matter tends to divide us a lot. However we are united in that we all love Eva and we all speculate as to the true meaning of Eva and its nuances(wow the parallelism of that sentence sucked). That being said, logans and sayings have a way of spreading like wildfire.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Dec 03, 2010 4:51 pm Grimmjow wrote: However we are united in that we all love Eva

[]: It fits             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Fri Dec 03, 2010 4:57 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: I'm just curious where Carl's original quote came from.

[]:             Quote Post by C.A.P. » Fri Dec 03, 2010 4:58 pm so the tagline is... ironic? My god, my whole prescriptive of the fanbase will never be the same again...

[]:             Quote Post by DoubleZeva » Fri Dec 03, 2010 5:24 pm Evangelion divides us all. Like Stem Cells.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Fri Dec 03, 2010 5:28 pm DoubleZeva wrote: Evangelion divides us all. Like Stem Cells.

[]:             Quote Post by Dirty Mick » Fri Dec 03, 2010 7:04 pm I think Carl Horn has the anime/manga slogen in his signature on an Excel Saga message board.

[]:             Quote Post by DoubleZeva » Fri Dec 03, 2010 11:49 pm supershinjiasukashipper wrote: Nah, your thinking of 4-Kids, 4-Kids divides us all like stem-cells and then takes a dump on perfectly good shows because of their over conservative prodestant sponsors.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Fri Dec 03, 2010 11:58 pm DoubleZeva wrote: But we all agree that 4kids sucks :/

[]:             Quote Post by Merridian » Sat Dec 04, 2010 12:09 am ^But the point of contention is that we don't.
